mapper.sql: id, create_time, modify_time, data_source, insert_type, pre_sql, post_sql, conf
mapper.insert: insert into writer_oracle (id, create_time, modify_time, data_source, insert_type, pre_sql, post_sql, conf) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, #{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{preSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into writer_oracle
id,
create_time,
modify_time,
data_source,
insert_type,
pre_sql,
post_sql,
conf,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
#{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{preSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{postSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update writer_oracle
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
data_source = #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler},
insert_type = #{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT},
pre_sql = #{preSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
post_sql = #{postSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update writer_oracle set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, data_source = #{dataSource,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.netease.bdms.ndi.service.web.config.mybatis.MyBatisJSONHandler}, insert_type = #{insertType,jdbcType=TINYINT}, pre_sql = #{preSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post_sql = #{postSql,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, conf = #{conf,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
